pkgmetadata.longdescription: NVIDIA cuDNN binary distribution rebuilt for the CUDA 13 ABI. The ::gentoo dev-libs/cudnn ebuilds are pinned to the cuda12 variant of upstream's tarball, which conflicts with installs that have moved to dev-util/nvidia-cuda-toolkit:0/13. This ebuild fetches the parallel cuda13 tarball from NVIDIA's redist mirror and lays it out under /opt/cuda/.
